name: Cookies in a Jiffy
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup red and green Holiday M&Ms
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat the first four ingredients together.
2. Stir in the M&Ms or chips.
3. Drop by tablespoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
4. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
5. Immediately remove to wire racks to cool.
